write.name: Write Display
write.description: Render a display image from payload elements and send it to the CoolLED sign.

payload.name: Payload
payload.description: Drawing elements (text, line, icon, qrcode, …). Colors depend on device type: single (off/on), seven (7 colors), colorful (RGB).

background.name: Background
background.description: Background color. Unsupported colors are mapped to the nearest color for the device.

threshold.name: Threshold
threshold.description: Luminance threshold for single-color devices when encoding the draw bitmap.

invert.name: Invert
invert.description: For single-color devices: when false, brighter pixels are lit (default).

dry_run.name: Dry Run
dry_run.description: Generate preview image without sending to device.

send_text.name: Send Text
send_text.description: Send scrolling text to a CoolLED sign.

text.name: Text
text.description: Text to display on the sign.

color.name: Color
color.description: Text color name (mapped to the device palette).

send_image.name: Send Image
send_image.description: Send a bitmap image file to a CoolLED sign.

image_path.name: Image Path
image_path.description: Local image file path to render on the sign.

threshold.name: Threshold
threshold.description: Luminance threshold for single-color bitmap encoding.

invert.name: Invert
invert.description: For single-color devices: when false, brighter pixels are lit.

send_animation.name: Send Animation
send_animation.description: Send an animated GIF to a CoolLED sign.

speed_ms.name: Frame Speed
speed_ms.description: Milliseconds between frames. Defaults to the GIF frame delay.

threshold.name: Threshold
threshold.description: Luminance threshold for single-color bitmap encoding.

invert.name: Invert
invert.description: For single-color devices: when false, brighter pixels are lit.

send_jt.name: Send JT Program
send_jt.description: Send a CoolLED JT program file (graffiti or animation).

set_icon.name: Set Built-in Icon
set_icon.description: Show a built-in icon by ID on the CoolLED sign.

set_music.name: Set Music Bars
set_music.description: Show an 8-bar music equalizer pattern on the sign.

data_description.retry_count: Number of retries before reporting failure.
